rag_rules: Repair only diagnostics tied to unresolved identifiers or invalid scope references in AGREE annexes; preserve all unrelated architecture.
generic_rules: Fix root unresolved references before modifying clauses; do not add new architecture to resolve missing types.
Place implementation-level bindings only in implementation annexes, never in component type annexes.
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: AGREE clauses must reference only identifiers visible in their annex scope—no external or unimported package references.
anti_patterns: Do not convert Boolean, enumeration, or opaque data ports into numeric comparisons—remove such clauses instead of forcing conversion.
Do not add package-qualified identifiers or property references not present in the original AADL model or its configured dependencies.
irrelevant_topics: Source_Data_Size (property association) does not point to anything
